name: Azazel Gamble 阿撒兹勒赌局
short_description: Join Azazel's lethal gambling arena—a high-stakes showdown of life or death. at a 4-player table with allies or adversaries, where cunning strategies and skills determine survival. Hunting demon or being hunted? Team up or solo.Hey guys !Are you ready to embrace the chaos of a blood-soaked gamble?
detailed_description:
Welcome to Azazel Gamble: The Ultimate Fate Gamble!

Gameplay: One Mode Available, More to Come!

Gamble Mode: Fate Roulette

"Hide the bullet or not? Dare to bet? Dare to challenge?"​​
​4-Player Revolver Showdown: A Psychological and Luck-Based Ultimate Battle!​​
With real bullets and a bluffing art more intense than Russian Roulette!

​I. Core Rules & Settings​

​Setup:​​

  • ​Players:​​ 4 players, each equipped with 1 revolver + 1 live bullet.

  • ​Lives:​​ Each player starts with 3 lives. Losing a life occurs if hit by a bullet. The last survivor or the first to reach ​13 points​ wins.

  • ​Core Mechanics:​​

    • ​Bullet Hiding: Choose to load a live bullet or leave the chamber empty.

    • ​Betting: Wager on the number of bullets fired at you this round (0–5).

    • ​Bluffing: Accuse opponents of hiding bullets. Guess wrong, and you risk adding a live bullet to your revolver.

​II. Game Flow Explained​

​1️⃣ Preparation Phase​

  • Each player loads ​1 live bullet​ into their revolver (the rest are empty rounds).

  • ​Critical Choice:

    • ​Hide Bullet: Do ​not​ load the live bullet (leave chamber empty).

    • ​Normal Load: Insert the live bullet into the chamber.

​2️⃣ Betting Phase​

  • Each player bets on the ​number of bullets fired at them​ this round (0–5).

  • ​Strategy Tip: Higher bets yield higher rewards but increase risk!

​3️⃣ Challenge Phase​

  • Players can accuse ​any opponent​ of hiding bullets.

  • ​Rules:

    • If correct: The accused loses ​1 life.

    • If wrong: The accuser gains ​1 live bullet​ added to their revolver.

​4️⃣ Shooting Phase​

  • Spin the revolver’s cylinder and pull the trigger ​based on your bet​ (e.g., bet 3 → spin 3 times).

  • ​Survival Reward: Survive all shots → Earn ​betting points​ (e.g., bet 3 → +3 points).

  • ​Death Penalty: Hit by a bullet → Lose 1 life. ​Zero lives left? Eliminated!​​

​5️⃣ Settlement Phase​

  • Points are tallied each round.

  • ​Winning Conditions:

    • First to reach ​13 points.

    • Last player alive if all others are eliminated.

Why You’ll Love Azazel Gamble

  • Engaging Multiplayer Online Experience
    Every match is full of suspense, filled with the clash of wit and courage as you battle to survive.

  • Regular Updates with New Characters and Gameplay
    We constantly bring new challenges and updates to keep the experience fresh and exciting for players.

  • Immersive, Thrilling Atmosphere
    The game’s environment and sound design will transport you into a terrifying world, making every twist and confrontation filled with tension.

Meet the Characters in the Game:

  • Brad (Street Gangster)
    Once a core member of a notorious mafia, Brad was imprisoned for 10 years. Upon his release, he is cast out by his former boss. Realizing his old crime family never had his best interests at heart, Brad slowly forms a new “team” from people he never expected, aiming to build a new criminal empire in an unfamiliar world.

  • Natalie (Freelance Writer)
    Natalie, also known by her pseudonym “Ghost,” is a shadow writer. She works behind the scenes, penning memoirs for high-profile individuals. One day, she takes on a task to finish the memoir of a former head of state, after the original writer mysteriously commits suicide. As she works on the book, the ex-leader is accused of war crimes, and Natalie finds herself caught in a political storm.

  • Ashton (Loan Shark)
    On the surface, Ashton appears to be an average middle-aged man. However, in reality, he leads a dangerous, high-stakes life providing financial solutions to the rich and influential. Clients view him as a godsend, but despite his ability to fix everyone else’s problems, Ashton struggles to repair his own troubled life.

  • Vanessa (Office Clerk)
    By day, Vanessa is a humble office clerk earning a meager salary. By night, she transforms into the "Gun Queen" of the online world. Operating a website called "Silent Land," she sells firearms to anyone willing to pay. Wherever there’s gunfire, there’s Vanessa’s weapons making their presence known.

Are You Ready for the Challenge?

In Azazel Gamble, every choice could mean the difference between life and death. Everyone is playing for their life—can you break the curse of fate and escape alive? Join us, uncover the secrets hidden behind each player, and push your limits to the edge!

Follow Us
Stay connected through social media to get the latest game information and exclusive previews. Don’t miss out on any of the thrilling action!
